IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. HAS-CLOSE-ELEMENTS.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-NUMBERS OCCURS 5 TIMES INDEXED BY NI COMP-2.
           05 L-THRESHOLD COMP-2.
           05 RESULT PIC 9.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE 0 TO RESULT
           PERFORM VARYING NI FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL NI > 5
               PERFORM VARYING NI FROM NI + 1 BY 1 UNTIL NI > 5
                   IF FUNCTION ABS(L-NUMBERS(NI) - L-NUMBERS(NI)) < L-THRESHOLD
                       MOVE 1 TO RESULT
                       EXIT PERFORM
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
           END-PERFORM
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SEPARATE-PAREN-GROUPS.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-PAREN-STRING PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC X(100).

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-CURRENT-STRING PIC X(100) VALUE SPACES.
       01 WS-CURRENT-DEPTH PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X.
       01 WS-LEN PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE 1 TO WS-INDEX
           MOVE SPACES TO WS-CURRENT-STRING
           MOVE 0 TO WS-CURRENT-DEPTH
           MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(L-PAREN-STRING) TO WS-LEN

           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > WS-LEN
               MOVE L-PAREN-STRING(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR
               IF WS-CHAR = '(' THEN
                   ADD 1 TO WS-CURRENT-DEPTH
                   STRING WS-CURRENT-STRING DELIMITED BY SIZE
                          WS-CHAR DELIMITED BY SIZE
                          INTO WS-CURRENT-STRING
               ELSE IF WS-CHAR = ')' THEN
                   SUBTRACT 1 FROM WS-CURRENT-DEPTH
                   STRING WS-CURRENT-STRING DELIMITED BY SIZE
                          WS-CHAR DELIMITED BY SIZE
                          INTO WS-CURRENT-STRING
                   IF WS-CURRENT-DEPTH = 0 THEN
                       MOVE WS-CURRENT-STRING TO RESULT(NI)
                       ADD 1 TO NI
                       MOVE SPACES TO WS-CURRENT-STRING
                   END-IF
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM

           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. TRUNCATE-NUMBER.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-NUMBER COMP-2.
           05 RESULT COMP-2.



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       *>--------------------------------------------------------------
       *>  Truncate the fractional part of a floating‑point number.
       *>  Equivalent to Java:  return number % 1.0;
       *>--------------------------------------------------------------
           COMPUTE RESULT = FUNCTION MOD (L-NUMBER, 1.0)
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM TRUNCATE-NUMBER.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. BELOW-ZERO.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-OPERATIONS OCCURS 8 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 BALANCE PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 I PIC 9(2) VALUE 1.
       01 TEMP PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > 8
               MOVE L-OPERATIONS(I) TO TEMP
               ADD TEMP TO BALANCE
               IF BALANCE < 0
                   MOVE 1 TO RESULT
                   GOBACK
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE 0 TO RESULT
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. INTERSPERSE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-NUMBERS OCCURS 3 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 L-DELIMETER PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC S9(10).


       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(4) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-RESULT-INDEX PIC 9(4) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-RESULT-COUNT PIC 9(4) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           IF L-NUMBERS(1) = 0 THEN
               MOVE 0 TO WS-RESULT-COUNT
           ELSE
               PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 3
                   IF WS-INDEX = 3 THEN
                       MOVE L-NUMBERS(WS-INDEX) TO RESULT(WS-RESULT-INDEX)
                       ADD 1 TO WS-RESULT-INDEX
                   ELSE
                       MOVE L-NUMBERS(WS-INDEX) TO RESULT(WS-RESULT-INDEX)
                       ADD 1 TO WS-RESULT-INDEX
                       MOVE L-DELIMETER TO RESULT(WS-RESULT-INDEX)
                       ADD 1 TO WS-RESULT-INDEX
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
               COMPUTE WS-RESULT-COUNT = WS-RESULT-INDEX - 1
           END-IF
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. PARSE-NESTED-PARENS.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-PAREN-STRING PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-DEPTH PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-MAX-DEPTH PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X.
       01 WS-GROUP PIC X(100).
       01 WS-GROUP-LEN PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-SPACE PIC X VALUE SPACE.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 100
               MOVE L-PAREN-STRING TO WS-GROUP
               INSPECT WS-GROUP TALLYING WS-GROUP-LEN FOR CHARACTERS
               IF WS-GROUP-LEN > 0
                   MOVE 0 TO WS-DEPTH
                   MOVE 0 TO WS-MAX-DEPTH
                   PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > WS-GROUP-LEN
                       MOVE WS-GROUP(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR
                       IF WS-CHAR = '('
                           ADD 1 TO WS-DEPTH
                           IF WS-DEPTH > WS-MAX-DEPTH
                               MOVE WS-DEPTH TO WS-MAX-DEPTH
                           END-IF
                       ELSE
                           SUBTRACT 1 FROM WS-DEPTH
                       END-IF
                   END-PERFORM
                   MOVE WS-MAX-DEPTH TO RESULT(WS-INDEX)
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. FILTER-BY-SUBSTRING.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-STRINGS OCCURS 3 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC X(100).
           05 L-SUBSTRING PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC X(100).


       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-RESULT-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-FOUND PIC 9 VALUE 0.
       01 WS-LEN-STRING PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-LEN-SUBSTRING PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-START PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-END PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-TEMP-STRING PIC X(100).
       01 WS-TEMP-SUBSTRING PIC X(100).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 3
               MOVE L-STRINGS(WS-INDEX) TO WS-TEMP-STRING
               MOVE L-SUBSTRING TO WS-TEMP-SUBSTRING
               PERFORM CHECK-SUBSTRING
               IF WS-FOUND = 1
                   MOVE WS-TEMP-STRING TO RESULT(WS-RESULT-INDEX)
                   ADD 1 TO WS-RESULT-INDEX
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           GOBACK.

       CHECK-SUBSTRING.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-FOUND
           MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(WS-TEMP-STRING) TO WS-LEN-STRING
           MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(WS-TEMP-SUBSTRING) TO WS-LEN-SUBSTRING
           IF WS-LEN-SUBSTRING = 0
               MOVE 1 TO WS-FOUND
           ELSE
               PERFORM VARYING WS-START FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-START > WS-LEN-STRING - WS-LEN-SUBSTRING + 1
                   MOVE WS-START TO WS-END
                   ADD WS-LEN-SUBSTRING TO WS-END
                   IF WS-TEMP-STRING(WS-START:WS-LEN-SUBSTRING) = WS-TEMP-SUBSTRING(1:WS-LEN-SUBSTRING)
                       MOVE 1 TO WS-FOUND
                       EXIT PERFORM
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
           END-IF.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SUM-PRODUCT.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-NUMBERS OCCURS 4 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC S9(10).


       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-SUM PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-PRODUCT PIC S9(10) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(4) VALUE 1.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 4
               ADD L-NUMBERS(WS-INDEX) TO WS-SUM
               MULTIPLY L-NUMBERS(WS-INDEX) BY WS-PRODUCT
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-SUM TO RESULT(1)
           MOVE WS-PRODUCT TO RESULT(2)
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. ROLLING-MAX.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-NUMBERS OCCURS 4 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC S9(10).


       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-ROLLING-MAX PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(4) COMP VALUE 1.
       01 WS-RESULT-INDEX PIC 9(4) COMP VALUE 1.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           IF L-NUMBERS(1) = 0
               MOVE 0 TO RESULT(1)
               GOBACK
           END-IF

           MOVE L-NUMBERS(1) TO WS-ROLLING-MAX
           MOVE WS-ROLLING-MAX TO RESULT(1)
           MOVE 2 TO WS-INDEX
           MOVE 2 TO WS-RESULT-INDEX

           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 4
               IF L-NUMBERS(WS-INDEX) > WS-ROLLING-MAX
                   MOVE L-NUMBERS(WS-INDEX) TO WS-ROLLING-MAX
               END-IF
               MOVE WS-ROLLING-MAX TO RESULT(WS-RESULT-INDEX)
               ADD 1 TO WS-RESULT-INDEX
           END-PERFORM

           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. STRING-XOR.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-A PIC X(100).
           05 L-B PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC X(100).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE SPACES TO RESULT
           PERFORM VARYING IDX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL IDX > 100
               IF L-A(IDX:1) = L-B(IDX:1)
                   MOVE "0" TO RESULT(IDX:1)
               ELSE
                   MOVE "1" TO RESULT(IDX:1)
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM STRING-XOR.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. LONGEST.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-STRINGS OCCURS 3 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC X(100).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           IF L-STRINGS(1) = SPACES
               MOVE SPACES TO RESULT
           ELSE
               MOVE L-STRINGS(1) TO RESULT
               PERFORM VARYING NI FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL NI > 3
                   IF FUNCTION LENGTH(L-STRINGS(NI)) > FUNCTION LENGTH(RESULT)
                       MOVE L-STRINGS(NI) TO RESULT
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
           END-IF
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. GREATEST-COMMON-DIVISOR.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-A PIC S9(10).
           05 L-B PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).


       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-A PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-B PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-TEMP PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-A TO WS-A.
           MOVE L-B TO WS-B.

           IF WS-A = 0 OR WS-B = 0 THEN
               COMPUTE RESULT = WS-A + WS-B
           ELSE
               IF WS-A = WS-B THEN
                   MOVE WS-A TO RESULT
               ELSE
                   IF WS-A > WS-B THEN
                       PERFORM UNTIL WS-B = 0
                           COMPUTE WS-TEMP = FUNCTION MOD(WS-A, WS-B)
                           MOVE WS-B TO WS-A
                           MOVE WS-TEMP TO WS-B
                       END-PERFORM
                       MOVE WS-A TO RESULT
                   ELSE
                       PERFORM UNTIL WS-A = 0
                           COMPUTE WS-TEMP = FUNCTION MOD(WS-B, WS-A)
                           MOVE WS-A TO WS-B
                           MOVE WS-TEMP TO WS-A
                       END-PERFORM
                       MOVE WS-B TO RESULT
                   END-IF
               END-IF
           END-IF.

           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. ALL-PREFIXES.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-STRING PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC X(100).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE 1 TO NI
           PERFORM VARYING NI FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL NI > LENGTH OF L-STRING
               MOVE L-STRING(1:NI) TO RESULT(NI)
           END-PERFORM
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM ALL-PREFIXES.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. STRING-SEQUENCE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC X(100).

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-RESULT PIC X(100).
       01 WS-SPACE PIC X VALUE SPACE.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE SPACES TO WS-RESULT
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 0 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > L-N
               IF WS-INDEX = L-N
                   STRING WS-INDEX DELIMITED BY SIZE
                          INTO WS-RESULT
                          END-STRING
               ELSE
                   STRING WS-INDEX DELIMITED BY SIZE
                          WS-SPACE DELIMITED BY SIZE
                          INTO WS-RESULT
                          END-STRING
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. COUNT-DISTINCT-CHARACTERS.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-STRING PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-STRING PIC X(100).
       01 WS-LOWER-STRING PIC X(100).
       01 WS-SET.
           05 WS-SET-ITEM OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY IDX.
               10 WS-SET-CHAR PIC X.
       01 WS-SET-SIZE PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X.
       01 WS-FOUND PIC X VALUE 'N'.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-STRING TO WS-STRING.
           MOVE FUNCTION LOWER-CASE(WS-STRING) TO WS-LOWER-STRING.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1
               UNTIL WS-INDEX > FUNCTION LENGTH(WS-LOWER-STRING)
               MOVE WS-LOWER-STRING(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR
               IF WS-CHAR NOT = SPACE
                   MOVE 'N' TO WS-FOUND
                   PERFORM VARYING IDX FROM 1 BY 1
                       UNTIL IDX > WS-SET-SIZE OR WS-FOUND = 'Y'
                       IF WS-SET-CHAR(IDX) = WS-CHAR
                           MOVE 'Y' TO WS-FOUND
                       END-IF
                   END-PERFORM
                   IF WS-FOUND = 'N'
                       ADD 1 TO WS-SET-SIZE
                       MOVE WS-CHAR TO WS-SET-CHAR(WS-SET-SIZE)
                   END-IF
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-SET-SIZE TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. PARSE-MUSIC.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-MUSIC-STRING PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE 1 TO NI
           PERFORM UNTIL NI > 100
               EVALUATE L-MUSIC-STRING(NI:1)
                   WHEN "o"
                       MOVE 4 TO RESULT(NI)
                   WHEN "o|"
                       MOVE 2 TO RESULT(NI)
                   WHEN ".|"
                       MOVE 1 TO RESULT(NI)
                   WHEN OTHER
                       MOVE 0 TO RESULT(NI)
               END-EVALUATE
               ADD 1 TO NI
           END-PERFORM
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM PARSE-MUSIC.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. HOW-MANY-TIMES.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-STRING PIC X(100).
           05 L-SUBSTRING PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE 0 TO RESULT
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > FUNCTION LENGTH(L-STRING) - FUNCTION LENGTH(L-SUBSTRING) + 1
               IF L-STRING(I:FUNCTION LENGTH(L-SUBSTRING)) = L-SUBSTRING THEN
                   ADD 1 TO RESULT
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM HOW-MANY-TIMES.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SORT-NUMBERS.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-NUMBERS PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC X(100).

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 NUMS.
           05 NUM-ITEM OCCURS 10 TIMES.
               10 NUM-STRING PIC X(10).
       01 NUM-ARRAY.
           05 NUM-VALUE OCCURS 10 TIMES PIC 9.
       01 RESULT-ARRAY.
           05 RESULT-STRING OCCURS 10 TIMES PIC X(10).
       01 I PIC 9(2) VALUE 1.
       01 J PIC 9(2) VALUE 1.
       01 TEMP-NUM PIC 9.
       01 TEMP-STRING PIC X(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           PERFORM SPLIT-NUMBERS
           PERFORM CONVERT-TO-NUMBERS
           PERFORM SORT-NUMBERS
           PERFORM CONVERT-TO-STRINGS
           PERFORM JOIN-RESULTS
           GOBACK.

       SPLIT-NUMBERS.
           UNSTRING L-NUMBERS DELIMITED BY SPACE
               INTO NUM-STRING(1) NUM-STRING(2) NUM-STRING(3) NUM-STRING(4) NUM-STRING(5)
                    NUM-STRING(6) NUM-STRING(7) NUM-STRING(8) NUM-STRING(9) NUM-STRING(10).

       CONVERT-TO-NUMBERS.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > 10
               EVALUATE NUM-STRING(I)
                   WHEN "zero" MOVE 0 TO NUM-VALUE(I)
                   WHEN "one" MOVE 1 TO NUM-VALUE(I)
                   WHEN "two" MOVE 2 TO NUM-VALUE(I)
                   WHEN "three" MOVE 3 TO NUM-VALUE(I)
                   WHEN "four" MOVE 4 TO NUM-VALUE(I)
                   WHEN "five" MOVE 5 TO NUM-VALUE(I)
                   WHEN "six" MOVE 6 TO NUM-VALUE(I)
                   WHEN "seven" MOVE 7 TO NUM-VALUE(I)
                   WHEN "eight" MOVE 8 TO NUM-VALUE(I)
                   WHEN "nine" MOVE 9 TO NUM-VALUE(I)
                   WHEN OTHER CONTINUE
               END-EVALUATE
           END-PERFORM.

       SORT-NUMBERS.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > 9
               PERFORM VARYING J FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL J > 10
                   IF J > I AND NUM-VALUE(I) > NUM-VALUE(J)
                       MOVE NUM-VALUE(I) TO TEMP-NUM
                       MOVE NUM-VALUE(J) TO NUM-VALUE(I)
                       MOVE TEMP-NUM TO NUM-VALUE(J)
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
           END-PERFORM.

       CONVERT-TO-STRINGS.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > 10
               EVALUATE NUM-VALUE(I)
                   WHEN 0 MOVE "zero" TO RESULT-STRING(I)
                   WHEN 1 MOVE "one" TO RESULT-STRING(I)
                   WHEN 2 MOVE "two" TO RESULT-STRING(I)
                   WHEN 3 MOVE "three" TO RESULT-STRING(I)
                   WHEN 4 MOVE "four" TO RESULT-STRING(I)
                   WHEN 5 MOVE "five" TO RESULT-STRING(I)
                   WHEN 6 MOVE "six" TO RESULT-STRING(I)
                   WHEN 7 MOVE "seven" TO RESULT-STRING(I)
                   WHEN 8 MOVE "eight" TO RESULT-STRING(I)
                   WHEN 9 MOVE "nine" TO RESULT-STRING(I)
                   WHEN OTHER CONTINUE
               END-EVALUATE
           END-PERFORM.

       JOIN-RESULTS.
           MOVE SPACES TO RESULT
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > 10
               IF RESULT-STRING(I) NOT = SPACES
                   STRING RESULT DELIMITED BY SIZE
                          RESULT-STRING(I) DELIMITED BY SIZE
                          INTO RESULT
                   END-STRING
                   IF I < 10
                       STRING RESULT DELIMITED BY SIZE
                              " " DELIMITED BY SIZE
                              INTO RESULT
                       END-STRING
                   END-IF
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. FIND-CLOSEST-ELEMENTS.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-NUMBERS OCCURS 6 TIMES INDEXED BY NI COMP-2.
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ COMP-2.



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-CLOSEST-PAIR.
           05 WS-CLOSEST-PAIR-1 COMP-2.
           05 WS-CLOSEST-PAIR-2 COMP-2.
       01 WS-DISTANCE COMP-2.
       01 WS-I PIC 9(4) COMP.
       01 WS-J PIC 9(4) COMP.
       01 WS-TEMP COMP-2.
       01 WS-RESULT-COUNT PIC 9(4) COMP VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           *> Initialize the closest pair with the first two numbers
           MOVE L-NUMBERS(1) TO WS-CLOSEST-PAIR-1
           MOVE L-NUMBERS(2) TO WS-CLOSEST-PAIR-2
           COMPUTE WS-DISTANCE = FUNCTION ABS(WS-CLOSEST-PAIR-2 - WS-CLOSEST-PAIR-1)

           *> Find the closest pair
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > 6
               PERFORM VARYING WS-J FROM WS-I + 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-J > 6
                   COMPUTE WS-TEMP = FUNCTION ABS(L-NUMBERS(WS-I) - L-NUMBERS(WS-J))
                   IF WS-TEMP < WS-DISTANCE
                       MOVE L-NUMBERS(WS-I) TO WS-CLOSEST-PAIR-1
                       MOVE L-NUMBERS(WS-J) TO WS-CLOSEST-PAIR-2
                       COMPUTE WS-DISTANCE = WS-TEMP
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
           END-PERFORM

           *> Sort the closest pair
           IF WS-CLOSEST-PAIR-1 > WS-CLOSEST-PAIR-2
               MOVE WS-CLOSEST-PAIR-1 TO WS-TEMP
               MOVE WS-CLOSEST-PAIR-2 TO WS-CLOSEST-PAIR-1
               MOVE WS-TEMP TO WS-CLOSEST-PAIR-2
           END-IF

           *> Return the result
           MOVE WS-CLOSEST-PAIR-1 TO RESULT(1)
           MOVE WS-CLOSEST-PAIR-2 TO RESULT(2)
           MOVE 2 TO WS-RESULT-COUNT

           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. RESCALE-TO-UNIT.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-NUMBERS OCCURS 5 TIMES INDEXED BY NI COMP-2.
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ COMP-2.



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-MIN-NUMBER COMP-2 VALUE 0.
       01 WS-MAX-NUMBER COMP-2 VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX COMP-5 VALUE 0.
       01 WS-TEMP-NUMBER COMP-2 VALUE 0.
       01 WS-RESULT-NUMBER COMP-2 VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 5
               IF WS-INDEX = 1
                   MOVE L-NUMBERS(WS-INDEX) TO WS-MIN-NUMBER
                   MOVE L-NUMBERS(WS-INDEX) TO WS-MAX-NUMBER
               ELSE
                   IF L-NUMBERS(WS-INDEX) < WS-MIN-NUMBER
                       MOVE L-NUMBERS(WS-INDEX) TO WS-MIN-NUMBER
                   END-IF
                   IF L-NUMBERS(WS-INDEX) > WS-MAX-NUMBER
                       MOVE L-NUMBERS(WS-INDEX) TO WS-MAX-NUMBER
                   END-IF
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM

           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 5
               MOVE L-NUMBERS(WS-INDEX) TO WS-TEMP-NUMBER
               COMPUTE WS-RESULT-NUMBER = (WS-TEMP-NUMBER - WS-MIN-NUMBER) / (WS-MAX-NUMBER - WS-MIN-NUMBER)
               MOVE WS-RESULT-NUMBER TO RESULT(WS-INDEX)
           END-PERFORM

           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. LARGEST-DIVISOR.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).


       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-I PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-N TO WS-I
           SUBTRACT 1 FROM WS-I
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM WS-I BY -1 UNTIL WS-I = 0
               IF FUNCTION MOD(L-N, WS-I) = 0
                   MOVE WS-I TO RESULT
                   EXIT PERFORM
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           IF RESULT = 0
               MOVE 1 TO RESULT
           END-IF
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. FACTORIZE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).


       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-N PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-I PIC S9(10) VALUE 2.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC S9(10) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-REMAINDER PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-N TO WS-N
           PERFORM UNTIL WS-N <= 1
               DIVIDE WS-N BY WS-I GIVING WS-N REMAINDER WS-REMAINDER
               IF WS-REMAINDER = 0
                   MOVE WS-I TO RESULT (WS-INDEX)
                   ADD 1 TO WS-INDEX
               ELSE
                   ADD 1 TO WS-I
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. REMOVE-DUPLICATES.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-NUMBERS OCCURS 5 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC S9(10).


       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-COUNTS.
           05 WS-COUNT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC S9(10).

       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-RESULT-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-FOUND PIC X VALUE 'N'.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 5
               MOVE 'N' TO WS-FOUND
               PERFORM VARYING NJ FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL NJ > WS-RESULT-INDEX
                   IF L-NUMBERS(WS-INDEX) = RESULT(NJ)
                       MOVE 'Y' TO WS-FOUND
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
               IF WS-FOUND = 'N'
                   MOVE L-NUMBERS(WS-INDEX) TO RESULT(WS-RESULT-INDEX)
                   ADD 1 TO WS-RESULT-INDEX
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. FLIP-CASE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-STRING PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC X(100).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE SPACES TO RESULT
           PERFORM VARYING IDX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL IDX > FUNCTION LENGTH(L-STRING)
               EVALUATE TRUE
                   WHEN FUNCTION UPPER-CASE(L-STRING(IDX:1)) = L-STRING(IDX:1)
                       MOVE FUNCTION LOWER-CASE(L-STRING(IDX:1)) TO RESULT(IDX:1)
                   WHEN FUNCTION LOWER-CASE(L-STRING(IDX:1)) = L-STRING(IDX:1)
                       MOVE FUNCTION UPPER-CASE(L-STRING(IDX:1)) TO RESULT(IDX:1)
                   WHEN OTHER
                       MOVE L-STRING(IDX:1) TO RESULT(IDX:1)
               END-EVALUATE
           END-PERFORM
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM FLIP-CASE.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.

           05 RESULT PIC X(100).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE SPACES TO RESULT.
           PERFORM VARYING NI FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL NI > 3
               STRING RESULT DELIMITED BY SIZE
                      L-STRINGS(NI) DELIMITED BY SIZE
                      INTO RESULT
           END-PERFORM.
           DISPLAY RESULT.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM CONCATENATE.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. FILTER-BY-PREFIX.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-STRINGS OCCURS 4 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC X(100).
           05 L-PREFIX PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC X(100).


       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-RESULT-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-LEN-PREFIX PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-LEN-STRING PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-TEMP-STRING PIC X(100).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(L-PREFIX) TO WS-LEN-PREFIX.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 4
               MOVE L-STRINGS(WS-INDEX) TO WS-TEMP-STRING
               MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(WS-TEMP-STRING) TO WS-LEN-STRING
               IF WS-LEN-STRING >= WS-LEN-PREFIX
                   IF WS-TEMP-STRING(1:WS-LEN-PREFIX) = L-PREFIX
                       MOVE WS-TEMP-STRING TO RESULT(WS-RESULT-INDEX)
                       ADD 1 TO WS-RESULT-INDEX
                   END-IF
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM.
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. IS-PRIME.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-N PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-K PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-RESULT PIC 9 VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-N TO WS-N
           IF WS-N < 2
               MOVE 0 TO WS-RESULT
           ELSE
               MOVE 1 TO WS-RESULT
               PERFORM VARYING WS-K FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL WS-K >= WS-N
                   IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-N, WS-K) = 0
                       MOVE 0 TO WS-RESULT
                       EXIT PERFORM
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
           END-IF
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. UNIQUE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-L OCCURS 9 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC S9(10).


       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-UNIQUE-COUNT PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-UNIQUE-ITEMS.
           05 WS-UNIQUE OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NK PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-TEMP PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-I PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-J PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-K PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-FOUND PIC X VALUE 'N'.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING NI FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL NI > 9
               MOVE L-L(NI) TO WS-TEMP
               MOVE 'N' TO WS-FOUND
               PERFORM VARYING NK FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL NK > WS-UNIQUE-COUNT
                   IF WS-UNIQUE(NK) = WS-TEMP
                       MOVE 'Y' TO WS-FOUND
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
               IF WS-FOUND = 'N'
                   ADD 1 TO WS-UNIQUE-COUNT
                   MOVE WS-TEMP TO WS-UNIQUE(WS-UNIQUE-COUNT)
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM

           PERFORM SORT-UNIQUE

           PERFORM VARYING NJ FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL NJ > WS-UNIQUE-COUNT
               MOVE WS-UNIQUE(NJ) TO RESULT(NJ)
           END-PERFORM

           GOBACK.

       SORT-UNIQUE.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I >= WS-UNIQUE-COUNT
               PERFORM VARYING WS-J FROM WS-I BY 1 UNTIL WS-J > WS-UNIQUE-COUNT
                   IF WS-UNIQUE(WS-I) > WS-UNIQUE(WS-J)
                       MOVE WS-UNIQUE(WS-I) TO WS-TEMP
                       MOVE WS-UNIQUE(WS-J) TO WS-UNIQUE(WS-I)
                       MOVE WS-TEMP TO WS-UNIQUE(WS-J)
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
           END-PERFORM.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING NI FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL NI > 3
               IF L-L(NI) > WS-MAX
                   MOVE L-L(NI) TO WS-MAX
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. FIZZ-BUZZ.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).


       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-RESULT PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-I PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-DIGIT PIC X.
       01 WS-TEMP-N PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-RESULT
           MOVE L-N TO WS-TEMP-N
           SUBTRACT 1 FROM WS-TEMP-N
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > WS-TEMP-N
               IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-I, 11) = 0 OR FUNCTION MOD(WS-I, 13) = 0
                   MOVE WS-I TO WS-TEMP-N
                   PERFORM VARYING WS-TEMP-N FROM WS-I BY 1 UNTIL WS-TEMP-N = 0
                       DIVIDE WS-TEMP-N BY 10 GIVING WS-TEMP-N REMAINDER WS-DIGIT
                       IF WS-DIGIT = '7'
                           ADD 1 TO WS-RESULT
                       END-IF
                   END-PERFORM
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. PRIME-FIB.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).


       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 F0 PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 F1 PIC S9(10) VALUE 1.
       01 P PIC S9(10).
       01 IS-PRIME PIC X VALUE 'T'.
       01 K PIC S9(10).
       01 MIN-VALUE PIC S9(10).
       01 SQRT-P PIC S9(10).
       01 TEMP-VALUE PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM UNTIL L-N = 0
               COMPUTE P = F0 + F1
               MOVE 'T' TO IS-PRIME
               IF P < 2
                   MOVE 'F' TO IS-PRIME
               ELSE
                   COMPUTE SQRT-P = FUNCTION SQRT(P)
                   COMPUTE MIN-VALUE = FUNCTION MIN(SQRT-P + 1, P - 1)
                   PERFORM VARYING K FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL K >= MIN-VALUE
                       IF FUNCTION MOD(P, K) = 0
                           MOVE 'F' TO IS-PRIME
                           EXIT PERFORM
                       END-IF
                   END-PERFORM
               END-IF
               IF IS-PRIME = 'T'
                   SUBTRACT 1 FROM L-N
               END-IF
               MOVE F1 TO F0
               MOVE P TO F1
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE P TO RESULT
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. TRIPLES-SUM-TO-ZERO.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-L OCCURS 4 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 I PIC 9(4) COMP VALUE 1.
       01 J PIC 9(4) COMP VALUE 1.
       01 K PIC 9(4) COMP VALUE 1.
       01 SUM PIC S9(10) COMP VALUE 0.
       01 FOUND-FLAG PIC 9 VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > 4
               PERFORM VARYING J FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL J > 4
                   IF J > I
                       PERFORM VARYING K FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL K > 4
                           IF K > J
                               COMPUTE SUM = L-L(I) + L-L(J) + L-L(K)
                               IF SUM = 0
                                   MOVE 1 TO FOUND-FLAG
                                   EXIT PERFORM
                               END-IF
                           END-IF
                       END-PERFORM
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE FOUND-FLAG TO RESULT
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. PAIRS-SUM-TO-ZERO.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-L OCCURS 4 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 I PIC 9(4) COMP-5.
       01 J PIC 9(4) COMP-5.
       01 TEMP PIC S9(10).
       01 FOUND PIC 9 VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > 4
               PERFORM VARYING J FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL J > 4
                   IF I NOT = J
                       COMPUTE TEMP = L-L(I) + L-L(J)
                       IF TEMP = 0
                           MOVE 1 TO FOUND
                           EXIT PERFORM
                       END-IF
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
               IF FOUND = 1
                   EXIT PERFORM
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE FOUND TO RESULT
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. CHANGE-BASE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-X PIC S9(10).
           05 L-BASE PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC X(100).

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-REMAINDER PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-RESULT-STRING PIC X(100) VALUE SPACES.
       01 WS-TEMP-STRING PIC X(100) VALUE SPACES.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE SPACES TO WS-RESULT-STRING.
           MOVE 1 TO WS-INDEX.

           PERFORM UNTIL L-X <= 0
               COMPUTE WS-REMAINDER = FUNCTION MOD(L-X, L-BASE)
               MOVE WS-REMAINDER TO WS-TEMP-STRING(WS-INDEX:1)
               ADD 1 TO WS-INDEX
               COMPUTE L-X = L-X / L-BASE
           END-PERFORM.

           MOVE WS-TEMP-STRING TO WS-RESULT-STRING.

           MOVE WS-RESULT-STRING TO RESULT.

           GOBACK.

       BEGIN.

       END PROGRAM TRIANGLE-AREA.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. MEDIAN.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-L OCCURS 5 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT COMP-2.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-SORTED-LIST.
           05 WS-SORTED OCCURS 5 TIMES INDEXED BY SI PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(4) COMP.
       01 WS-TEMP PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-SIZE PIC 9(4) COMP.
       01 WS-MEDIAN PIC S9(10)V9(10).
       01 WS-REMAINDER PIC 9(4) COMP.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE 5 TO WS-SIZE.
           PERFORM SORT-LIST.
           PERFORM CALCULATE-MEDIAN.
           MOVE WS-MEDIAN TO RESULT.
           GOBACK.

       SORT-LIST.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > WS-SIZE
               SET SI TO WS-INDEX
               MOVE L-L(WS-INDEX) TO WS-SORTED(SI)
           END-PERFORM.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > WS-SIZE
               SET SI TO WS-INDEX
               PERFORM VARYING WS-TEMP FROM WS-INDEX BY 1 UNTIL WS-TEMP > WS-SIZE
                   SET SI TO WS-TEMP
                   IF WS-SORTED(WS-INDEX) > WS-SORTED(WS-TEMP)
                       MOVE WS-SORTED(WS-INDEX) TO WS-TEMP
                       MOVE WS-SORTED(WS-TEMP) TO WS-SORTED(WS-INDEX)
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
           END-PERFORM.

       CALCULATE-MEDIAN.
           DIVIDE WS-SIZE BY 2 GIVING WS-INDEX REMAINDER WS-REMAINDER.
           IF WS-REMAINDER = 0
               COMPUTE WS-MEDIAN = (WS-SORTED(WS-INDEX) + WS-SORTED(WS-INDEX + 1)) / 2
           ELSE
               MOVE WS-SORTED(WS-INDEX + 1) TO WS-MEDIAN
           END-IF.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. IS-PALINDROME.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-TEXT PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-LEN PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-I PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X.
       01 WS-CHAR-REV PIC X.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(L-TEXT) TO WS-LEN
           IF WS-LEN = 0
               MOVE 1 TO RESULT
               GOBACK
           END-IF
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > WS-LEN / 2
               MOVE L-TEXT(WS-I:1) TO WS-CHAR
               MOVE L-TEXT(WS-LEN - WS-I + 1:1) TO WS-CHAR-REV
               IF WS-CHAR NOT = WS-CHAR-REV
                   MOVE 0 TO RESULT
                   GOBACK
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE 1 TO RESULT
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. MODP.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 L-P PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).


       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-RET PIC S9(10) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-I PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 0 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I >= L-N
               COMPUTE WS-RET = FUNCTION MOD(WS-RET * 2, L-P)
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-RET TO RESULT
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. REMOVE-VOWELS.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-TEXT PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC X(100).

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X.
       01 WS-LOWER-CHAR PIC X.
       01 WS-RESULT-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-RESULT-TEXT PIC X(100) VALUE SPACES.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1
               UNTIL WS-INDEX > FUNCTION LENGTH(L-TEXT)
               MOVE L-TEXT(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR
               MOVE FUNCTION LOWER-CASE(WS-CHAR) TO WS-LOWER-CHAR
               IF WS-LOWER-CHAR NOT = 'a' AND
                  WS-LOWER-CHAR NOT = 'e' AND
                  WS-LOWER-CHAR NOT = 'i' AND
                  WS-LOWER-CHAR NOT = 'o' AND
                  WS-LOWER-CHAR NOT = 'u'
                  MOVE WS-CHAR TO WS-RESULT-TEXT(WS-RESULT-INDEX:1)
                  ADD 1 TO WS-RESULT-INDEX
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-RESULT-TEXT TO RESULT
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. BELOW-THRESHOLD.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-L OCCURS 4 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 L-T PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(2) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-RESULT PIC 9 VALUE 1.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 4
               IF L-L(WS-INDEX) >= L-T
                   MOVE 0 TO WS-RESULT
                   EXIT PERFORM
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. ADD.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-X PIC S9(10).
           05 L-Y PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       BEGIN.
           COMPUTE RESULT = L-X + L-Y.
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM ADD.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SAME-CHARS.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-S0 PIC X(100).
           05 L-S1 PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE 0 TO RESULT
           IF L-S0 = L-S1 THEN
               MOVE 1 TO RESULT
           END-IF
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM SAME-CHARS.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. FIB.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).


       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-N PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-RESULT PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-TEMP1 PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-TEMP2 PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-INDEX PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-N TO WS-N
           IF WS-N = 0 THEN
               MOVE 0 TO WS-RESULT
           ELSE IF WS-N = 1 THEN
               MOVE 1 TO WS-RESULT
           ELSE
               MOVE 0 TO WS-TEMP1
               MOVE 1 TO WS-TEMP2
               PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > WS-N
                   COMPUTE WS-RESULT = WS-TEMP1 + WS-TEMP2
                   MOVE WS-TEMP2 TO WS-TEMP1
                   MOVE WS-RESULT TO WS-TEMP2
               END-PERFORM
           END-IF
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. CORRECT-BRACKETING.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-BRACKETS PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-DEPTH PIC S9(4) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X.
       01 WS-LEN PIC 9(3).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(L-BRACKETS) TO WS-LEN
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > WS-LEN
               MOVE L-BRACKETS(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR
               IF WS-CHAR = '<'
                   ADD 1 TO WS-DEPTH
               ELSE
                   SUBTRACT 1 FROM WS-DEPTH
               END-IF
               IF WS-DEPTH < 0
                   MOVE 0 TO RESULT
                   GOBACK
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           IF WS-DEPTH = 0
               MOVE 1 TO RESULT
           ELSE
               MOVE 0 TO RESULT
           END-IF
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. COMMON.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-L1 OCCURS 4 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 L-L2 OCCURS 4 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NK PIC S9(10).


       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-SET.
           05 WS-SET-ITEM OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY WS-SET-INDEX PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-SET-COUNT PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-RESULT-COUNT PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-TEMP PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-I PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-J PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-K PIC 9(3).
       01 WS-FOUND PIC X VALUE 'N'.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM INITIALIZE-SET
           PERFORM RETAIN-ALL
           PERFORM SORT-RESULT
           PERFORM RETURN-RESULT
           GOBACK.

       INITIALIZE-SET.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-SET-COUNT
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > 4
               MOVE L-L1(WS-I) TO WS-TEMP
               PERFORM CHECK-AND-ADD-TO-SET
           END-PERFORM.

       CHECK-AND-ADD-TO-SET.
           MOVE 'N' TO WS-FOUND
           PERFORM VARYING WS-J FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-J > WS-SET-COUNT
               IF WS-SET-ITEM(WS-J) = WS-TEMP
                   MOVE 'Y' TO WS-FOUND
                   EXIT PERFORM
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           IF WS-FOUND = 'N'
               ADD 1 TO WS-SET-COUNT
               MOVE WS-TEMP TO WS-SET-ITEM(WS-SET-COUNT)
           END-IF.

       RETAIN-ALL.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-RESULT-COUNT
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > 4
               MOVE L-L2(WS-I) TO WS-TEMP
               PERFORM CHECK-AND-ADD-TO-RESULT
           END-PERFORM.

       CHECK-AND-ADD-TO-RESULT.
           MOVE 'N' TO WS-FOUND
           PERFORM VARYING WS-J FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-J > WS-SET-COUNT
               IF WS-SET-ITEM(WS-J) = WS-TEMP
                   MOVE 'Y' TO WS-FOUND
                   EXIT PERFORM
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           IF WS-FOUND = 'Y'
               ADD 1 TO WS-RESULT-COUNT
               MOVE WS-TEMP TO RESULT(WS-RESULT-COUNT)
           END-IF.

       SORT-RESULT.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I >= WS-RESULT-COUNT
               PERFORM VARYING WS-J FROM WS-I BY 1 UNTIL WS-J > WS-RESULT-COUNT
                   IF WS-J > WS-I
                       IF RESULT(WS-I) > RESULT(WS-J)
                           MOVE RESULT(WS-I) TO WS-TEMP
                           MOVE RESULT(WS-J) TO RESULT(WS-I)
                           MOVE WS-TEMP TO RESULT(WS-J)
                       END-IF
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
           END-PERFORM.

       RETURN-RESULT.
           EXIT PROGRAM.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. LARGEST-PRIME-FACTOR.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).


       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-LARGEST PIC S9(10) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-J PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-I PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-IS-PRIME PIC X VALUE 'Y'.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-J FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL WS-J > L-N
               IF FUNCTION MOD(L-N, WS-J) = 0
                   MOVE 'Y' TO WS-IS-PRIME
                   PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I >= WS-J - 1
                       IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-J, WS-I) = 0
                           MOVE 'N' TO WS-IS-PRIME
                           EXIT PERFORM
                       END-IF
                   END-PERFORM
                   IF WS-IS-PRIME = 'Y'
                       IF WS-J > WS-LARGEST
                           MOVE WS-J TO WS-LARGEST
                       END-IF
                   END-IF
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-LARGEST TO RESULT
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SUM-TO-N.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).


       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC S9(10) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-RESULT PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-RESULT
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > L-N
               ADD WS-INDEX TO WS-RESULT
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. DERIVATIVE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-XS OCCURS 3 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC S9(10).


       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-RESULT-INDEX PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-RESULT-COUNT PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 3
               COMPUTE RESULT(WS-RESULT-INDEX) = WS-INDEX * L-XS(WS-INDEX)
               ADD 1 TO WS-RESULT-INDEX
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-RESULT-INDEX TO WS-RESULT-COUNT
           DISPLAY "Result: " WS-RESULT-COUNT
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > WS-RESULT-COUNT
               DISPLAY RESULT(WS-INDEX)
           END-PERFORM
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. FIBFIB.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).


       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-N PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-RESULT PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-TEMP1 PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-TEMP2 PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-TEMP3 PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-N TO WS-N
           IF WS-N = 0 THEN
               MOVE 0 TO WS-RESULT
           ELSE IF WS-N = 1 THEN
               MOVE 0 TO WS-RESULT
           ELSE IF WS-N = 2 THEN
               MOVE 1 TO WS-RESULT
           ELSE
               MOVE 0 TO WS-TEMP1
               MOVE 0 TO WS-TEMP2
               MOVE 1 TO WS-TEMP3
               PERFORM VARYING WS-N FROM 3 BY 1 UNTIL WS-N > L-N
                   COMPUTE WS-RESULT = WS-TEMP1 + WS-TEMP2 + WS-TEMP3
                   MOVE WS-TEMP2 TO WS-TEMP1
                   MOVE WS-TEMP3 TO WS-TEMP2
                   MOVE WS-RESULT TO WS-TEMP3
               END-PERFORM
           END-IF
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. VOWELS-COUNT.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-S PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 VOWELS PIC X(10) VALUE "aeiouAEIOU".
       01 N-VOWELS PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 I PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 CHAR-C PIC X(1).
       01 LENGTH-S PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(L-S) TO LENGTH-S
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > LENGTH-S
               MOVE L-S(I:1) TO CHAR-C
               IF CHAR-C = "y" OR CHAR-C = "Y"
                   ADD 1 TO N-VOWELS
               ELSE
                   IF VOWELS(I:1) = CHAR-C
                       ADD 1 TO N-VOWELS
                   END-IF
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE N-VOWELS TO RESULT
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. DIGITSUM.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-S PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-SUM PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(4) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X.
       01 WS-ASCII PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1
               UNTIL WS-INDEX > FUNCTION LENGTH(L-S)
               MOVE L-S(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR
               IF WS-CHAR >= "A" AND WS-CHAR <= "Z"
                   COMPUTE WS-ASCII = FUNCTION ORD(WS-CHAR)
                   ADD WS-ASCII TO WS-SUM
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-SUM TO RESULT
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. FRUIT-DISTRIBUTION.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-S PIC X(100).
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-N TO RESULT
           SUBTRACT L-S FROM RESULT
           DISPLAY RESULT
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM FRUIT-DISTRIBUTION.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. PLUCK.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-ARR OCCURS 10 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC S9(10).


       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-MIN-VALUE PIC S9(10) VALUE 9999999999.
       01 WS-MIN-INDEX PIC S9(10) VALUE -1.
       01 WS-RESULT-COUNT PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 10
               IF FUNCTION MOD(L-ARR(WS-INDEX), 2) = 0
                   IF L-ARR(WS-INDEX) < WS-MIN-VALUE
                       MOVE L-ARR(WS-INDEX) TO WS-MIN-VALUE
                       MOVE WS-INDEX TO WS-MIN-INDEX
                   END-IF
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM

           IF WS-MIN-INDEX NOT = -1
               MOVE WS-MIN-VALUE TO RESULT(1)
               MOVE WS-MIN-INDEX TO RESULT(2)
               MOVE 2 TO WS-RESULT-COUNT
           END-IF

           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SEARCH.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-LST OCCURS 5 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 MAX-VALUE PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 FRQ-TABLE.
           05 FRQ OCCURS 1000 TIMES INDEXED BY FI PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 ANS PIC S9(10) VALUE -1.
       01 I PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING NI FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL NI > 5
               IF L-LST(NI) > MAX-VALUE
                   MOVE L-LST(NI) TO MAX-VALUE
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM

           PERFORM VARYING NI FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL NI > 5
               ADD 1 TO FRQ(L-LST(NI))
           END-PERFORM

           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL I > MAX-VALUE
               IF FRQ(I) >= I
                   MOVE I TO ANS
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM

           MOVE ANS TO RESULT
           GOBACK.

       01 WS-TEMP-INDEX-97 PIC 9(4).
       01 WS-TEMP-INDEX-98 PIC 9(4).
       01 WS-TEMP-INDEX-99 PIC 9(4).
       01 WS-TEMP-INDEX-100 PIC 9(4).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 4
               IF WS-SWITCH = 'T'
                   MOVE L-LST(WS-INDEX) TO WS-MIN
                   PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 4
                       IF L-LST(WS-INDEX) < WS-MIN
                           MOVE L-LST(WS-INDEX) TO WS-MIN
                       END-IF
                   END-PERFORM
                   MOVE WS-MIN TO RESULT(WS-RESULT-INDEX)
                   ADD 1 TO WS-RESULT-INDEX
                   PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 4
                       IF L-LST(WS-INDEX) = WS-MIN
                           MOVE WS-INDEX TO WS-TEMP-INDEX
                           EXIT PERFORM
                       END-IF
                   END-PERFORM
                   MOVE WS-TEMP-INDEX TO WS-TEMP
                   PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM WS-TEMP-INDEX BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 4
                       MOVE L-LST(WS-INDEX) TO L-LST(WS-INDEX - 1)
                   END-PERFORM
                   MOVE 0 TO L-LST(4)
                   MOVE 'F' TO WS-SWITCH
               ELSE
                   MOVE L-LST(WS-INDEX) TO WS-MAX
                   PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 4
                       IF L-LST(WS-INDEX) > WS-MAX
                           MOVE L-LST(WS-INDEX) TO WS-MAX
                       END-IF
                   END-PERFORM
                   MOVE WS-MAX TO RESULT(WS-RESULT-INDEX)
                   ADD 1 TO WS-RESULT-INDEX
                   PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 4
                       IF L-LST(WS-INDEX) = WS-MAX
                           MOVE WS-INDEX TO WS-TEMP-INDEX
                           EXIT PERFORM
                       END-IF
                   END-PERFORM
                   MOVE WS-TEMP-INDEX TO WS-TEMP
                   PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM WS-TEMP-INDEX BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 4
                       MOVE L-LST(WS-INDEX) TO L-LST(WS-INDEX - 1)
                   END-PERFORM
                   MOVE 0 TO L-LST(4)
                   MOVE 'T' TO WS-SWITCH
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           EXIT PROGRAM.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. TRIANGLE-AREA.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-A PIC S9(10).
           05 L-B PIC S9(10).
           05 L-C PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT COMP-2.



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-A PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-B PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-C PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-S PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-AREA PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-TEMP PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-RESULT PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-A TO WS-A.
           MOVE L-B TO WS-B.
           MOVE L-C TO WS-C.
           IF WS-A + WS-B <= WS-C OR WS-A + WS-C <= WS-B OR WS-B + WS-C <= WS-A THEN
               MOVE -1 TO RESULT
           ELSE
               COMPUTE WS-S = (WS-A + WS-B + WS-C) / 2
               COMPUTE WS-AREA = FUNCTION SQRT(WS-S * (WS-S - WS-A) * (WS-S - WS-B) * (WS-S - WS-C))
               COMPUTE WS-TEMP = WS-AREA * 100
               COMPUTE WS-RESULT = FUNCTION INTEGER(WS-TEMP + 0.5)
               COMPUTE WS-RESULT = WS-RESULT / 100
               MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT
           END-IF.
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. WILL-IT-FLY.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-Q OCCURS 3 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 L-W PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-SUM PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-I PIC 9 VALUE 1.
       01 WS-J PIC 9 VALUE 3.
       01 WS-FLAG PIC 9 VALUE 1.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > 3
               ADD L-Q(WS-I) TO WS-SUM
           END-PERFORM

           IF WS-SUM > L-W
               MOVE 0 TO RESULT
           ELSE
               PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > 3
                   IF L-Q(WS-I) NOT = L-Q(4 - WS-I)
                       MOVE 0 TO RESULT
                       MOVE 0 TO WS-FLAG
                       EXIT PERFORM
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM

               IF WS-FLAG = 1
                   MOVE 1 TO RESULT
               END-IF
           END-IF

           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SMALLEST-CHANGE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-ARR OCCURS 7 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE 0 TO RESULT
           PERFORM VARYING NI FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL NI > 3
               IF L-ARR(NI) NOT = L-ARR(8 - NI)
                   ADD 1 TO RESULT
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           DISPLAY RESULT
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM SMALLEST-CHANGE.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. TOTAL-MATCH.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-LST1 OCCURS 10 TIMES INDEXED BY NI PIC X(100).
           05 L-LST2 OCCURS 10 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NK PIC X(100).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE 0 TO L1 L2
           PERFORM VARYING NI FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL NI > 10
               IF L-LST1(NI) NOT = SPACES
                   COMPUTE L1 = L1 + FUNCTION LENGTH(L-LST1(NI))
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           PERFORM VARYING NJ FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL NJ > 10
               IF L-LST2(NJ) NOT = SPACES
                   COMPUTE L2 = L2 + FUNCTION LENGTH(L-LST2(NJ))
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           IF L1 <= L2
               PERFORM VARYING NI FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL NI > 10
                   IF L-LST1(NI) NOT = SPACES
                       MOVE L-LST1(NI) TO RESULT(NI)
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
           ELSE
               PERFORM VARYING NJ FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL NJ > 10
                   IF L-LST2(NJ) NOT = SPACES
                       MOVE L-LST2(NJ) TO RESULT(NJ)
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
           END-IF
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. IS-MULTIPLY-PRIME.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-A PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 I PIC S9(10).
       01 J PIC S9(10).
       01 K PIC S9(10).
       01 IS-PRIME-FLAG PIC 9 VALUE 0.
       01 TEMP-RESULT PIC 9 VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE 0 TO TEMP-RESULT
           PERFORM VARYING I FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL I > 100
               PERFORM IS-PRIME
               IF IS-PRIME-FLAG = 1
                   PERFORM VARYING J FROM I BY 1 UNTIL J > 100
                       PERFORM IS-PRIME
                       IF IS-PRIME-FLAG = 1
                           PERFORM VARYING K FROM J BY 1 UNTIL K > 100
                               PERFORM IS-PRIME
                               IF IS-PRIME-FLAG = 1
                                   IF I * J * K = L-A
                                       MOVE 1 TO TEMP-RESULT
                                       EXIT PERFORM
                                   END-IF
                               END-IF
                           END-PERFORM
                       END-IF
                   END-PERFORM
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE TEMP-RESULT TO RESULT
           GOBACK.

       IS-PRIME.
           MOVE 1 TO IS-PRIME-FLAG
           PERFORM VARYING J FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL J >= I
               IF FUNCTION MOD(I, J) = 0
                   MOVE 0 TO IS-PRIME-FLAG
                   EXIT PERFORM
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           EXIT.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. IS-SIMPLE-POWER.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-X PIC S9(10).
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-POWER PIC S9(10) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-RESULT PIC 9 VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           IF L-N = 1 THEN
               IF L-X = 1 THEN
                   MOVE 1 TO WS-RESULT
               ELSE
                   MOVE 0 TO WS-RESULT
               END-IF
           ELSE
               MOVE 1 TO WS-POWER
               PERFORM UNTIL WS-POWER >= L-X
                   MULTIPLY WS-POWER BY L-N GIVING WS-POWER
               END-PERFORM
               IF WS-POWER = L-X THEN
                   MOVE 1 TO WS-RESULT
               ELSE
                   MOVE 0 TO WS-RESULT
               END-IF
           END-IF
           MOVE WS-RESULT TO RESULT
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. ISCUBE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-A PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-ABS-A PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-ROOT PIC S9(10)V9(10).
       01 WS-ROOT-INT PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-ROOT-INT-CUBE PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-ABS-A-CUBE PIC S9(10).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-A TO WS-ABS-A.
           COMPUTE WS-ABS-A = FUNCTION ABS(WS-ABS-A).
           COMPUTE WS-ROOT = FUNCTION SQRT(WS-ABS-A).
           COMPUTE WS-ROOT-INT = FUNCTION INTEGER(WS-ROOT).
           COMPUTE WS-ROOT-INT-CUBE = WS-ROOT-INT * WS-ROOT-INT * WS-ROOT-INT.
           COMPUTE WS-ABS-A-CUBE = WS-ABS-A * WS-ABS-A * WS-ABS-A.
           IF WS-ROOT-INT-CUBE = WS-ABS-A-CUBE
               MOVE 1 TO RESULT
           ELSE
               MOVE 0 TO RESULT
           END-IF.
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. HEX-KEY.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-NUM PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-PRIMES PIC X(6) VALUE "2357BD".
       01 WS-TOTAL PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(4) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-CHAR PIC X.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-TOTAL
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1
                   UNTIL WS-INDEX > FUNCTION LENGTH(L-NUM)
               MOVE L-NUM(WS-INDEX:1) TO WS-CHAR
               IF WS-CHAR = "2" OR WS-CHAR = "3" OR WS-CHAR = "5"
                   OR WS-CHAR = "7" OR WS-CHAR = "B" OR WS-CHAR = "D"
                   ADD 1 TO WS-TOTAL
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM
           MOVE WS-TOTAL TO RESULT
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. DECIMAL-TO-BINARY.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.

       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE "db" TO RESULT(1:2).

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. IS-HAPPY.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-S PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-LEN PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-I PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-CHAR-1 PIC X.
       01 WS-CHAR-2 PIC X.
       01 WS-CHAR-3 PIC X.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(L-S) TO WS-LEN
           IF WS-LEN < 3 THEN
               MOVE 0 TO RESULT
               GOBACK
           END-IF

           PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I > WS-LEN - 2
               MOVE L-S(WS-I:1) TO WS-CHAR-1
               MOVE L-S(WS-I + 1:1) TO WS-CHAR-2
               MOVE L-S(WS-I + 2:1) TO WS-CHAR-3
               IF WS-CHAR-1 = WS-CHAR-2 OR WS-CHAR-2 = WS-CHAR-3 OR WS-CHAR-1 = WS-CHAR-3 THEN
                   MOVE 0 TO RESULT
                   GOBACK
               END-IF
           END-PERFORM

           MOVE 1 TO RESULT
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. NUMERICAL-LETTER-GRADE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-GRADES OCCURS 5 TIMES INDEXED BY NI COMP-2.
           05 RESULT OCCURS 100 TIMES INDEXED BY NJ PIC X(100).

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(4) COMP-5 VALUE 1.
       01 WS-TEMP-GRADE PIC 9(3)V99 COMP-3.
       01 WS-TEMP-RESULT PIC X(100).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > 5
               MOVE L-GRADES(WS-INDEX) TO WS-TEMP-GRADE
               IF WS-TEMP-GRADE = 4.0
                   MOVE "A+" TO WS-TEMP-RESULT
               ELSE IF WS-TEMP-GRADE > 3.7
                   MOVE "A" TO WS-TEMP-RESULT
               ELSE IF WS-TEMP-GRADE > 3.3
                   MOVE "A-" TO WS-TEMP-RESULT
               ELSE IF WS-TEMP-GRADE > 3.0
                   MOVE "B+" TO WS-TEMP-RESULT
               ELSE IF WS-TEMP-GRADE > 2.7
                   MOVE "B" TO WS-TEMP-RESULT
               ELSE IF WS-TEMP-GRADE > 2.3
                   MOVE "B-" TO WS-TEMP-RESULT
               ELSE IF WS-TEMP-GRADE > 2.0
                   MOVE "C+" TO WS-TEMP-RESULT
               ELSE IF WS-TEMP-GRADE > 1.7
                   MOVE "C" TO WS-TEMP-RESULT
               ELSE IF WS-TEMP-GRADE > 1.3
                   MOVE "C-" TO WS-TEMP-RESULT
               ELSE IF WS-TEMP-GRADE > 1.0
                   MOVE "D+" TO WS-TEMP-RESULT
               ELSE IF WS-TEMP-GRADE > 0.7
                   MOVE "D" TO WS-TEMP-RESULT
               ELSE IF WS-TEMP-GRADE > 0.0
                   MOVE "D-" TO WS-TEMP-RESULT
               ELSE
                   MOVE "E" TO WS-TEMP-RESULT
               END-IF
               MOVE WS-TEMP-RESULT TO RESULT(WS-INDEX)
           END-PERFORM
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM NUMERICAL-LETTER-GRADE.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. PRIME-LENGTH.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-STRING PIC X(100).
           05 RESULT PIC 9.



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-LENGTH PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-I PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-REMAINDER PIC 9(3) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-PRIME-FLAG PIC 9 VALUE 1.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(L-STRING) TO WS-LENGTH
           IF WS-LENGTH = 0 OR WS-LENGTH = 1
               MOVE 0 TO RESULT
           ELSE
               MOVE 1 TO WS-PRIME-FLAG
               PERFORM VARYING WS-I FROM 2 BY 1 UNTIL WS-I >= WS-LENGTH
                   DIVIDE WS-LENGTH BY WS-I GIVING WS-REMAINDER REMAINDER WS-REMAINDER
                   IF WS-REMAINDER = 0
                       MOVE 0 TO WS-PRIME-FLAG
                       EXIT PERFORM
                   END-IF
               END-PERFORM
               MOVE WS-PRIME-FLAG TO RESULT
           END-IF
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. STARTS-ONE-ENDS.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC S9(10).


       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-POWER-OF-TEN PIC S9(10) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-INDEX PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           IF L-N = 1 THEN
               MOVE 1 TO RESULT
           ELSE
               MOVE 1 TO WS-POWER-OF-TEN
               MOVE 0 TO WS-INDEX
               PERFORM VARYING WS-INDEX FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-INDEX > L-N - 2
                   COMPUTE WS-POWER-OF-TEN = WS-POWER-OF-TEN * 10
               END-PERFORM
               COMPUTE RESULT = 18 * WS-POWER-OF-TEN
           END-IF
           GOBACK.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SOLVE.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.

       DATA DIVISION.

       LINKAGE SECTION.

       01 LINKED-ITEMS.
           05 L-N PIC S9(10).
           05 RESULT PIC X(100).



       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01 WS-N PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-SUM PIC S9(10) VALUE 0.
       01 WS-REMAINDER PIC S9(10).
       01 WS-INDEX PIC 9(4) VALUE 1.
       01 WS-RESULT-STRING PIC X(100) VALUE SPACES.
       01 WS-TEMP-STRING PIC X(100) VALUE SPACES.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LINKED-ITEMS.
       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE L-N TO WS-N
           PERFORM CALCULATE-SUM
           PERFORM CONVERT-TO-BINARY
           MOVE WS-RESULT-STRING TO RESULT
           GOBACK.

       CALCULATE-SUM.
           MOVE 0 TO WS-SUM
           PERFORM UNTIL WS-N = 0
               DIVIDE WS-N BY 10 GIVING WS-N REMAINDER WS-REMAINDER
               ADD WS-REMAINDER TO WS-SUM
           END-PERFORM.

       CONVERT-TO-BINARY.
           MOVE SPACES TO WS-RESULT-STRING
           MOVE WS-SUM TO WS-N
           IF WS-N = 0
               MOVE "0" TO WS-RESULT-STRING
           ELSE
               PERFORM UNTIL WS-N = 0
                   DIVIDE WS-N BY 2 GIVING WS-N REMAINDER WS-REMAINDER
                   MOVE FUNCTION CHAR(WS-REMAINDER + 48) TO WS-TEMP-STRING(WS-INDEX:1)
                   ADD 1 TO WS-INDEX
               END-PERFORM
               MOVE FUNCTION REVERSE(WS-TEMP-STRING(1:WS-INDEX - 1)) TO WS-RESULT-STRING
           END-IF.

       MAIN-LOGIC.
           MOVE 0 TO RESULT

               IF FUNCTION MOD(L-LST(NI), 2) = 0

           END-PERFORM
           DISPLAY RESULT
           GOBACK.
       END PROGRAM ADD.
